about_company: Nextera Robotics is an AI-native Robotics and Industrial Automation company founded at MIT. It is a fast-growing company with an A-list client base including Dunkin Donuts, Tesla, and Fortune 500 companies. Nextera graduated from Y-Combinator S20 and raised funding to solve industrial automation.
team_info: Teams are kept small and agile to limit unnecessary process. Autonomy is expected.
responsibilities: Help build and maintain state-of-the-art machine learning models for use in robotics, construction, energy and telecommunications
Work with engineers and annotators to grow a bank of high-quality training data
Maintain and build cloud architecture for ML pipelines
requirements: Advanced training in mathematics, statistics, physics, computer science, or another highly quantitative field
Proven academic or industry experience with machine vision, object detection, ViTs, or related technology
Structured approach to problem solving, creativity, strong communication skills, leadership skills
